description_long: This is a laptop with a classic clamshell design, featuring a screen and keyboard connected by a hinge. The screen displays horizontal black and white lines, suggesting it is powered on but not displaying typical content. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a trackpad below, and the palm rest area is clean and uncluttered. The back of the laptop lid is heavily decorated with various stickers, including logos, text, and graphics, giving it a personalized and urban appearance. The stickers include recognizable icons such as the Google Chrome logo, a large red 'R', and several band or tech-related graphics. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a sleek and slightly glossy finish.
description: A personalized laptop with a striped screen, standard keyboard, and a lid covered in colorful stickers and logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open laptop with a striped screen and visible keyboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the open angle of the screen relative to the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the laptop lid covered in various stickers and logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the laptop's profile and the open screen, similar to view 1.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying horizontal black and white lines with no clear content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: Multiple stickers are placed on the back of the laptop lid, including logos, text, and graphics, covering much of the surface.
